title: AI-Powered SDLC Factory — Implementation Timeline
subtitle: Phase 1: Build (20 wk) · Phase 2: Pilot & Prove (6 mo) · Phase 3: Enterprise Scale (8 mo) · 3 dev tracks · Jun 2026 – Dec 2027
goalReminder: North Star: 50% efficiency / 50% cost reduction over 2–3 years. Year 1 target: 12–24% on pilot projects. This timeline shows the credible ramp from build → proof → scale.

components.name: AI Gateway Configuration
components.detail: Centralized LLM routing via UPM AI Gateway. All 3 dev tracks route through this. Rate limiting, cost attribution per team.

components.name: Terraform IaC Foundation
components.detail: Base Terraform modules: Container Apps, AI Search, Key Vault, Entra ID. Reuses Siili AI Landing Zone patterns.

components.name: OpenTelemetry Pipeline
components.detail: Structured trace pipeline for all Factory agents. Feeds AI CoE centralized observability.

components.name: Agent Runtime (Semantic Kernel)
components.detail: Python + Semantic Kernel base runtime. Shared by all Factory workflow agents.

components.name: A2A Agent Card Standard
components.detail: Standardized agent discovery and communication protocol. Required by AI CoE for all Factory agents.

components.name: Cross-Track Standardization
components.detail: Standardize quality gates, reporting templates, and agent configurations across all 3 tracks. Single pane of glass for SDLC efficiency.

components.name: MCP: Confluence
components.detail: Read/write Confluence spaces. Used by Knowledge Hub, Spec agents, and Architecture Sparring.

components.name: MCP: SharePoint
components.detail: Document search and update via Microsoft Graph. Shared by Knowledge and Spec stages.

components.name: MCP: Azure DevOps
components.detail: Work items, pipelines, repos. All 3 tracks use ADO for CI/CD orchestration.

components.name: MCP: Jira
components.detail: Issue tracking, backlog management. Shared across all tracks.

components.name: MCP: ServiceNow
components.detail: Demand intake, incident data. Entry point for the IDEA→STRUCTURE pipeline.

components.name: MCP: GitHub
components.detail: PR creation, code review integration. Primary for Cloud/Web track.

components.name: 🔶 SAP A2A Governance Bridge
components.detail: A2A adapter connecting SAP Joule to Factory governance. Routes Joule requests through AI Gateway for cost attribution, audit logging, and policy enforcement. SAP uses native orchestration while Factory maintains observability. Leverages SAP Integration Suite MCP Gateway.

components.name: 🔷 SF Agentforce Governance Bridge
components.detail: A2A adapter connecting Salesforce Agentforce to Factory governance. Routes agent actions through AI Gateway for audit logging and cost attribution. Leverages Agentforce native MCP client for bidirectional tool exchange with Factory agents.

components.name: A2A Bridge Hardening (SAP + SF)
components.detail: Harden governance bridges based on pilot findings. Error handling, retry logic, audit trail completeness, performance under load.

components.name: Knowledge Hub — Vector Index
components.detail: Unified vector store: Confluence, SharePoint, Solman, architecture catalog, project history. Central brain of the Factory.

components.name: M365 Copilot · SharePoint Search
components.detail: Copilot in Word + M365 Chat over SharePoint. Immediate knowledge search for all teams.

components.name: Knowledge Intelligence Agent
components.detail: Doc gap detection, freshness scoring, update recommendations. Multi-source: Confluence, SP, Solman, SAP docs.

subComponents.name: Knowledge Orchestrator Agent
subComponents.detail: Session management, sub-agent coordination & task routing, HITL checkpoints, artifact assembly and output formatting.

subComponents.name: Doc Assessment & Cleanup
subComponents.detail: Assess and clean up existing documentation for accuracy and completeness. Maps to UPM use case 1.1.

subComponents.name: Conversational Search
subComponents.detail: Engage users in natural-language search over the knowledge base. Maps to UPM use case 1.2.

subComponents.name: Summarization
subComponents.detail: Summarize existing documentation and surface key capabilities. Maps to UPM use case 1.3.

subComponents.name: Guideline Compliance
subComponents.detail: Check documentation against Corporate guidelines and flag deviations. Maps to UPM use case 1.4.

subComponents.name: Human Sign-off & Publish
subComponents.detail: Route validated docs for human review, then update the knowledge base after sign-off. Maps to UPM use case 1.5.

components.name: Doc Curator Agent
components.detail: Automated doc cleanup, guideline alignment, IT transformation insight generation. HITL sign-off before publish. Feeds back into Knowledge Hub. Maps to UPM use cases 1.5, 1.6.

components.name: 🔶 SAP Knowledge Ingest
components.detail: Index SAP Solution Manager documents, ABAP custom code catalog, transport history, and SAP Notes into Knowledge Hub. Enables Factory agents to understand UPM's SAP landscape for code generation context and impact analysis.

components.name: 🔷 SF Knowledge Ingest
components.detail: Index Salesforce org metadata, custom object schemas, Apex class documentation, Flow definitions, and Data Cloud configuration into Knowledge Hub. Enables Factory agents to understand UPM's Salesforce landscape.

components.name: Knowledge Hub Expansion
components.detail: Ingest additional knowledge sources based on pilot gaps: architecture decisions, incident history, deployment patterns. Continuous enrichment.

components.name: Self-Improving Knowledge Graph
components.detail: Knowledge Hub auto-enrichment from resolved incidents, merged PRs, architecture decisions. Quality scores improve automatically over time.

components.name: Teams Meeting Transcription
components.detail: Meeting recaps, action items, follow-ups. Feeds into spec drafting for all tracks.

components.name: Spec Drafting (Word Copilot)
components.detail: Draft feature specs from prompts, meeting notes, Outlook threads. Track-agnostic — same spec format for all.

components.name: Business-to-Tech Spec Agent
components.detail: NL-to-structured-spec translation. Domain model awareness, acceptance criteria generation. Outputs feed all 3 tracks.

subComponents.name: Intent Orchestrator Agent
subComponents.detail: Session management, sub-agent coordination & task routing, HITL checkpoints, artifact assembly.

subComponents.name: Meeting Synthesis
subComponents.detail: Automatically synthesize meeting memos and extract business specs from Teams transcripts. Maps to UPM use case 3.1.

subComponents.name: Requirement Drafting
subComponents.detail: Draft and document business requirements as concept/feature specifications. Maps to UPM use case 3.3.

subComponents.name: Expert Sparring
subComponents.detail: Spar with domain experts to ensure specs are explicit and comprehensive. Maps to UPM use case 3.2.

subComponents.name: Business-to-Tech Translation
subComponents.detail: Translate business requirements to high-level technical requirements. Maps to UPM use case 3.4.

subComponents.name: Human Sign-off & Artifact Generation
subComponents.detail: Route specs for human validation, then generate artifacts via out-of-box tooling. Maps to UPM use case 3.5.

components.name: Historical Project Data Ingest
components.detail: Index historical projects from ADO/Keto/ServiceNow. Estimation baselines for Cloud, SAP, and SF projects.

components.name: Feature Requirement Agent
components.detail: Impact analysis, effort estimation, duplicate detection, proactive demand suggestion. Uses historical data across all 3 tracks.

subComponents.name: Demand Orchestrator Agent
subComponents.detail: Demand intake workflow and routing, sub-agent dispatch, HITL checkpoints, artifact assembly.

subComponents.name: Impact Analyser
subComponents.detail: Analyse new requirements and compare with current implementations across business areas. Maps to UPM use cases 2.1, 2.2.

subComponents.name: Effort Estimator
subComponents.detail: Suggest high-level time and effort estimation based on historical data. Maps to UPM use case 2.3.

subComponents.name: Backlog Qualifier
subComponents.detail: Validate backlog items against Definition of Ready compliance criteria. Maps to UPM use case 2.5.

subComponents.name: Timeline Builder
subComponents.detail: Build project timeline and create project structure from estimation output. Maps to UPM use case 2.4.

subComponents.name: Strategic Fit & Risk Assessment
subComponents.detail: Cross-cut value proposition analysis — strategic alignment, risk mapping, dependency impact. Also suggests new demands based on pattern mining. Maps to UPM use case 2.5.

components.name: Project Structure Creation
components.detail: Auto-generate project timelines, WBS, resource plans. Track-aware templates (Cloud vs SAP vs SF).

components.name: Architecture Catalog Ingest
components.detail: Index enterprise architecture catalog, dependency registry, ADRs. Covers Cloud, SAP, and SF landscapes.

components.name: Architecture Sparring Agent
components.detail: Interactive sparring with graph reasoning. ADR generation, compliance flagging, cross-track impact analysis.

subComponents.name: Sparring Orchestrator Agent
subComponents.detail: Session management, sub-agent management, HITL checkpoints, artifact assembly and output formatting.

subComponents.name: Architectural Sparring
subComponents.detail: Suggest solution options aligned with enterprise architecture patterns. Interactive dialogue. Maps to UPM use case 4.1.

subComponents.name: Compliance & Security Check
subComponents.detail: Flag risks against AI Gov, IT Security, and Data governance rules. Maps to UPM use case 4.2.

subComponents.name: Specification Refinement
subComponents.detail: Sharpen and structure technical specs from sparring output. Creates detailed specs for implementation. Maps to UPM use case 4.3.

subComponents.name: Dependency Mapping
subComponents.detail: Build system dependency maps from codebase and integration docs. Maps to UPM use case 4.4.

subComponents.name: Complexity & Risk Assessment
subComponents.detail: Surface hidden complexity drivers — integration, data, cross-domain impact. Maps to UPM use case 4.5.

components.name: MS Architecture Review Agent
components.detail: Microsoft's Architecture Review Agent from Foundry marketplace. Pre-built Azure Well-Architected checks. Accelerator for Cap 04.

components.name: Complexity & Risk Assessment
components.detail: Cross-system impact analysis, NFR validation. Understands SAP and SF dependency chains.

components.name: ☁️ GitHub Copilot Agent Mode
components.detail: Cloud/Web track: spec-to-code, multi-file edits, PR creation. Already approved & active at UPM.

components.name: ☁️ CodeRabbit PR Review
components.detail: Cloud/Web track: AI-powered code review on every PR. Configure rulesets for UPM standards.

components.name: ☁️ Semgrep OSS Scanning
components.detail: Cloud/Web track: OSS license compliance, vulnerability scanning. Black Duck procurement TBD Q4 2026.

components.name: 🔶 SAP Joule + Build Code
components.detail: SAP track: ABAP Cloud generation from specs. RAP business objects, CDS views, Fiori Elements. Joule Studio GA Q1 2026.

components.name: 🔷 Einstein for Developers
components.detail: SF track: Apex class generation, Lightning Web Components, Flow definitions, SOQL queries.

components.name: 🔶 SAP Code Review (Joule Studio)
components.detail: Joule Studio custom skills configured with UPM ABAP coding standards, naming conventions, and performance patterns. Reviews CDS views, RAP business objects, Fiori extensions. SAP equivalent of Cloud track's CodeRabbit.

components.name: 🔶 SAP ABAP Compliance Scan
components.detail: ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) with AI-enhanced rules for clean core compliance, custom code migration readiness, and deprecated API detection. Joule flags legacy patterns during code generation. SAP equivalent of Cloud track's Semgrep.

components.name: 🔷 SF ApexGuru Code Review
components.detail: AI-powered Apex performance analysis, anti-pattern detection, and governor limit risk assessment. Configured with UPM's Salesforce org-specific patterns and custom object conventions. SF equivalent of Cloud track's CodeRabbit.

components.name: 🔷 SF DevOps Center Pipeline
components.detail: Salesforce DevOps Center with GitHub integration, change tracking, and release management. SF CLI automation for org provisioning, deployment, and test execution. Connects SF track CI/CD to Factory quality gates.

components.name: Quality Gates Agent
components.detail: Automated gate checks before merge: test pass, coverage, SAST/DAST. Same gates apply to all 3 tracks.

components.name: Builder Orchestration Agent
components.detail: Routes specs to the right track's code gen tool. Coordinates review, quality gates, and spec-to-code traceability across tracks.

subComponents.name: Build Orchestrator Agent
subComponents.detail: Decompose spec into atomic tasks, dispatch sub-agents (parallel where possible), enforce quality gate at each step, HITL review checkpoints before merge.

subComponents.name: Code Implementor
subComponents.detail: Generate, iterate, and self-review per task. Delegates to track-specific code gen tools (Copilot / Joule / Einstein). Maps to UPM use case 5.1.

subComponents.name: Quality Gate Agent
subComponents.detail: Enforce pass criteria before task closes. Test pass, coverage, SAST/DAST, traceability matrix verification. Maps to UPM use cases 5.2, 5.3.

subComponents.name: Test-Driven Development
subComponents.detail: Load TDD contract first, then Red → Green → Refactor cycle. Contracts produced by Cap 06 Quality Spec Agent.

subComponents.name: Code Review Agent
subComponents.detail: Pattern conformance, coverage gaps, PR readiness. Ensures code meets standards before human review.

subComponents.name: Complexity & Risk Assessment
subComponents.detail: Surface hidden complexity drivers — integration, data, cross-domain impact. Shared instance with Cap 04 Sparring.

components.name: Cloud Pilot #1 — Net-new Feature
components.detail: First real project through the Factory. Full IDEA→DEPLOY pipeline on a net-new Cloud feature. Measures cycle time vs. pre-Factory baseline.

components.name: Cloud Pilot #2 — Maintenance/Bug Fix
components.detail: Maintenance scenario: bug triage, root cause via Knowledge Hub, AI-assisted fix, regression test gen. Measures mean-time-to-resolution improvement.

components.name: SAP Pilot — Fiori Extension
components.detail: SAP Fiori extension through Factory pipeline. Joule code generation → A2A governance bridge → Factory quality gates → Playwright E2E on Fiori. Validates SAP track end-to-end.

components.name: SF Pilot — Lightning Component
components.detail: Salesforce Lightning component through Factory pipeline. Agentforce code gen → A2A governance bridge → Factory quality gates → Playwright E2E on Lightning. Validates SF track end-to-end.

components.name: Cloud Track — Full Team Rollout
components.detail: Expand from pilot team to all Cloud/Web development teams. Onboard all developers to Factory tools, connect all repos to quality gates.

components.name: SAP Track — Full Team Rollout
components.detail: Expand SAP Factory usage to all SAP teams. Integrate remaining SAP modules, scale Joule governance to all workstreams.

components.name: SF Track — Full Team Rollout
components.detail: Expand SF Factory usage to all Salesforce teams. Scale Agentforce governance, onboard all orgs to Factory pipeline.

components.name: Playwright E2E Framework
components.detail: Universal test backbone. SAP Fiori = web, SF Lightning = web, Cloud apps = web. One framework tests all 3 tracks.

components.name: ☁️ Copilot Unit Test Gen
components.detail: Cloud/Web track: IDE-based unit test generation from code context. Jest/Vitest/pytest.

components.name: 🔶 SAP Joule Test Gen
components.detail: SAP track: ABAP Unit test class generation. Orchestrated by Factory quality agent, not replaced.

components.name: 🔶 SAP Fiori · Playwright Config
components.detail: Playwright page object models and selectors for SAP Fiori Elements and freestyle Fiori apps. Custom test helpers for OData service mocking, Fiori Launchpad navigation, and UI5 control interaction. Makes 'Playwright tests all 3 tracks' deliverable for SAP.

components.name: 🔷 SF Apex + LWC Test Config
components.detail: Apex unit test templates (75% coverage enforcement), LWC Jest test framework, and Playwright page objects for Lightning Experience. Custom test helpers for Salesforce-specific patterns: mock org data, custom object CRUD, Flow test scenarios.

components.name: AI Test Generation Agent
components.detail: Reads acceptance criteria from specs → generates Playwright E2E scripts. Works for all 3 tracks (all UIs are web-based). Phase 2 of Quality Orchestrator.

subComponents.name: Test Script Generator
subComponents.detail: TDD contract stubs (unit), integration & E2E scripts. Also called by Builder Agent. Maps to UPM use case 6.3.

subComponents.name: Automated Test Maintenance
subComponents.detail: Generate + maintain test suite — keep aligned with codebase changes. Maps to UPM use case 6.4.

subComponents.name: Defect Detection
subComponents.detail: Surface functional + non-functional defects during build phase. Maps to UPM use case 6.5.

subComponents.name: Test Report Generator
subComponents.detail: Coverage dashboard, defect reports, living quality baseline. Maps to UPM use case 6.6.

components.name: Quality Spec Agent
components.detail: Automated TDD contract generation from approved specs. Dual-phase: spec quality validation + test automation. Phase 1 of Quality Orchestrator.

subComponents.name: Quality Orchestrator Agent
subComponents.detail: Phase management: spec → contracts → automation. Sub-agent/skill dispatch. HITL checkpoints before build + before deploy.

subComponents.name: Quality Strategy
subComponents.detail: Testing approach per domain — coverage targets, risk tiers, QA guidelines. Maps to UPM use case 6.1.

subComponents.name: Spec → Acceptance Criteria
subComponents.detail: Convert requirements to testable acceptance criteria. HITL-validated before coding. Cross-shared with Biz Intent + Sparring. Maps to UPM use case 6.2.

subComponents.name: Test Plan Generator
subComponents.detail: Structured test plan — functional + NFR coverage, defect surfacing strategy. Maps to UPM use case 6.2.

subComponents.name: TDD Contract
subComponents.detail: Template artifact produced here, consumed by Builder Agent. Defines Red→Green→Refactor gate for each spec.

components.name: Test Report & Dashboard Agent
components.detail: Coverage dashboards, defect severity analysis, release readiness. Aggregates across all 3 tracks.

components.name: Security Posture Automation
components.detail: Expand SAST/DAST across all tracks. AI-assisted vulnerability triage, automated fix suggestions, compliance drift detection.

components.name: G1: Study → Design
components.detail: AI impact analysis completed. Demand compared to backlog. Same gate for Cloud, SAP, and SF tracks.

components.name: G2: Design → Realise
components.detail: Structured spec approved. Acceptance criteria defined. Track-specific tech impact mapped.

components.name: G3: Realise → Deploy
components.detail: Architecture sparring completed. ADR stored. Cross-track dependency map approved.

components.name: G4: Deploy → Run
components.detail: All test suites pass (Playwright E2E + track-specific unit tests). AMS knowledge base updated.

components.name: Adoption & ROI Dashboard
components.detail: Real-time dashboard: agent utilization, cost attribution, quality gate pass rates, developer satisfaction. Feeds the Phase 2 report.

components.name: Cost Optimization & Reporting
components.detail: AI cost attribution per team, per track. Token usage optimization, model routing (cheaper models for simple tasks). Quarterly savings reports toward 50% target.

components.name: Efficiency Gain Data Collection
components.detail: Collect AI efficiency data from all 3 tracks. Hours saved per stage. Negotiate gain sharing.

components.name: Knowledge Base Auto-Update
components.detail: Deployed solutions auto-update Knowledge Hub. Lessons learned, patterns, failures feed back into IDEA stage.

components.name: Community of Practice
components.detail: Cross-track champion network. Monthly KPI review. Best practice sharing between Cloud, SAP, and SF teams.

components.name: RFx Criteria Update with AI KPIs
components.detail: Future RFx includes: vendor AI adoption score, demonstrated efficiency gains. AI weighted at 20% of scoring.

components.name: Agent Prompt Tuning (All Tracks)
components.detail: Refine agent prompts based on pilot results. Tune Knowledge Hub relevance, code review accuracy, test generation coverage. Data-driven prompt versioning.

components.name: Advanced Analytics Agent
components.detail: Predictive analytics: sprint velocity trends, defect prediction, capacity planning based on Factory data. Feeds management reporting.

components.name: Executive Briefing & Awareness
components.detail: C-level briefing. Factory vision, 3-track model, KPI framework socialisation.

components.name: AI Champion Enablement (per track)
components.detail: One champion per track (Cloud, SAP, SF). 2-day enablement with track-specific tool demos.

components.name: Wave 1: PMs, BAs & Architects
components.detail: IDEA + STRUCTURE + REVIEW stages. Hands-on with Knowledge Hub, spec agents, sparring. Same for all tracks.

components.name: Wave 2a: ☁️ Cloud/Web Developers
components.detail: Copilot Agent Mode, CodeRabbit, Playwright, TDD contracts. Cloud-track specific BUILD + TEST training.

components.name: Wave 2b: 🔶 SAP Developers
components.detail: Joule + Build Code, ABAP Unit with AI, Playwright for Fiori. SAP-track specific BUILD + TEST training.

components.name: Wave 2c: 🔷 SF Developers
components.detail: Einstein for Devs, Agentforce, Playwright for Lightning. SF-track specific BUILD + TEST training.

components.name: Embedded Coaching & Office Hours
components.detail: Weekly Factory office hours per track. Champion-led peer coaching. Prompt library building.

components.name: Vendor SOW Addendum Templates
components.detail: All SOWs require: Factory tool usage, AI output logs per sprint. Track-specific tool requirements.

components.name: Vendor AI Governance Forum
components.detail: AI usage review with vendor leads across all 3 tracks. Non-compliance escalated to sourcing.

components.name: AMS Runbooks & Dashboards
components.detail: Per-stage Factory runbooks. Track-specific agent guides. Observability dashboards live before handover.

components.name: AMS Shadow Team (4 weeks)
components.detail: AMS team shadows Factory operations across all 3 tracks. Incident co-handling, handover sign-off.

components.name: Efficiency Baseline Measurement
components.detail: Capture pre-Factory baselines: cycle time, defect density, cost-per-feature, test coverage. Critical for proving Year 1 target of 12–24% improvement.

components.name: Phase 2 Savings Report
components.detail: Formal report: measured efficiency gains per track, cost savings, quality improvements, developer adoption rates. Go/no-go for Phase 3 scale-up.

crossDomain.headline: Factory Reusability — Build Once, All Tracks Benefit
crossDomain.subtext: Every Factory component serves all 3 development tracks. Track-specific tools (Joule, Einstein, Copilot) are plug-in code generators — the workflow around them is shared.

items.expandsTo: Single source of truth for docs, patterns, history across Cloud + SAP + SF
Universal test backbone — all 3 tracks are web-based
New tracks onboard in days via existing connectors
Same gates, same quality bar — different code gen tools per track
Works for any web-based UI (Cloud, Fiori, Lightning)
All future agents share same runtime + deployment model
